column1: Set these once a month; per-article labour + overhead compute here and feed every Cost Card
A. DIRECT LABOUR — rate PER WORKER = avg weekly wage ÷ articles per week
B. OVERHEADS — monthly cost ÷ articles per month
C. SELLING COSTS — % of sale price
Wage = TOTAL weekly wage for the role (all workers combined) — not one person
Only the real bank fee (money gone) is costed; withholding/advance/income tax are recoverable so excluded — accountant confirms sales-tax creditability
$ items converted at ~280 PKR/$ — update for the current rate
Ads can instead be tracked separately (KPI dashboard) rather than absorbed per article — your choice
D. OUTBOUND BANK CHARGES — money-gone portion (recoverable taxes excluded)
Bank charge rate (4% bank + 0.52% sales tax on it = money gone)
Recoverable (NOT in cost): 4% withholding + 5% advance + 15% sales tax — accountant to confirm
